title: Minecraft: Colonial
description: An all-in-one modpack with optimization mods, shaderpacks, and new mechanics.
body:
![Colonial Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a283fb559347f9de0761a20feb2bd7df476382d5.png)

---

[![MCO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be32703e1129305a26f914ead35e8edcc6ff4649.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/qmc-odyssey)

Colonial will help enhance your Minecraft experience. This modpack includes optimization mods along with Iris shaders so you can have beautiful scenery. Also included are item, block, and animation mods.

### What are some things that are included?
- Terrain Generation
    - Continents.
    - BetterNether.
    - BetterEnd.
    - YUNG's Structures.
- Gameplay Modifications
    - Hunger Remover.
    - First-person Model.
    - Better Combat.
    - Bridging Mod.
    - ImmersiveMC.
    - No Sneaking Over Magma!
- Audio
    - Sound Physics Remastered.
    - Simple Voice Chat.
    - Drip Sounds.
- Shaders/Resource Packs
    - Complementary Shaders - Reimagined.
    - BSL Shaders.
    - Fresh Animations.
  
This is just some of the things included in this amazing modpack! I hope you have fun. :D
